title: Counter Strike Armor
body:
**⚠ Important:**

-Not compatible with Optifine.

-Make sure to turn off skin layers.

 _Free to use on any public server._



This mod currently includes few high quality uniforms 
from Counter-Strike:
_Terorist Uniform:_
-Phoenix
-Separatist
-Elite Crew
_Counter Terorist Uniform:_
-SAS
-GIGN
-IDF
-GSG-9


The uniforms offer high durability and strong armor protection, making them practical for combat scenarios.

**Uniforms can't be crafted in Survival mode!**






Other project:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/miklos-military-armor
